HGSS.592.0000:
Welcome! This is the Global Trade
Station, or GTS for short.\f
We enable the trading of Pokémon with
people worldwide over Nintendo WFC.\f
Would you like to do a global
Pokémon trade? [0200,0000]
HGSS.592.0001:
Hello!
Welcome to the GTS!\f
Would you like to do a global Pokémon
trade over Nintendo Wi-Fi\r
Connection? [0200,0000]
HGSS.592.0002:
You may trade Pokémon one of two
ways at the GTS.\f
You may offer a Pokémon for trade,
or search among offered Pokémon.\f
Should I describe things in greater
detail? [0200,0000]
HGSS.592.0003:
You will be asked to put up the
Pokémon you are offering to trade.\f
At that time, you will be asked what
Pokémon you would like in return.\f
If another player offers your desired
Pokémon in return for your offered\r
Pokémon, the trade will go through.\f
Should I explain anything else? [0200,0000]
HGSS.592.0004:
You may search among the Pokémon
that are offered by other Trainers.\f
They will all identify what Pokémon
their Trainers want back in return.\f
If you find one that you want, you
must provide us with the kind of\r
Pokémon wanted in return.\f
Should I explain anything else? [0200,0000]
HGSS.592.0005:
Would you like to make a global
Pokémon trade? [0200,0000]
HGSS.592.0007:
I hope you enjoy your visit
to the GTS!\f
HGSS.592.0008:
...Uh-oh!\f
I’m sorry, but your team and all
your PC Boxes are full.\f
If you wish to use the GTS, you must
have room on your team or in a PC Box.
HGSS.592.0009:
...Uh-oh!
You only have one Pokémon with you.\f
If you wish to use the GTS, you must
have at least two Pokémon with you.\f
Please come back with more Pokémon
on your team.
HGSS.592.0010:
Such a small world it is, eh?\f
Eh? Wait, this is a miniature?
The real Earth is millions of times bigger\r
than this?\f
Whoaaaaaaa!
HGSS.592.0011:
They say if you communicate with
someone, their location is\r
recorded on this giant globe.
HGSS.592.0012:
All I need to do is leave a Pokémon
here to trade.\f
Who knows, it might be traded while
I’m asleep tonight.
HGSS.592.0013:
Using the equipment here, you can easily
trade Pokémon with other Pokémon fans\r
on the other side of the world!\f
That’s incredible!
HGSS.592.0014:
You can register where you live on
this giant globe.\f
Once you do, you can show your location
to anyone you communicate with.
HGSS.592.0015:
Nintendo WFC is so easy to use,
even I can trade Pokémon now!
HGSS.592.0016:
This week, I’ll do it!\f
I really want to make the Top 4 of the
rankings.
HGSS.592.0017:
The Global Terminal has three floors.\f
You use warp panels for getting from
one floor to another.\f
A blue panel takes you to the GTS on
the ground floor.\f
Take a green panel to the studios for
Box Data and Dress-Up Data on 2F.\f
Take a pink warp panel to the third
floor for the Battle Video Gallery.
HGSS.592.0019:
Your favorite is that Egg,
isn’t it? [0200,0000]
HGSS.592.0020:
Yes, I was right!
I thought so!
HGSS.592.0021:
...Oh? Your favorite really is
[0100,0000,0000], isn’t it?
HGSS.592.0022:
...Oh? Your favorite really is that Egg,
isn’t it?
HGSS.592.0023:
I want to know everyone’s favorite
kinds of Pokémon.
HGSS.592.0024:
Yo, yo, yo!\f
Wanna let the world know about you?
Then you gotta tell me, yo! [0200,0000]
HGSS.592.0025:
Yo, I know all I need to know about
you now.\f
If you want to change your message,
I’m the guy to see, yo!
HGSS.592.0026:
Yo! You don’t have anything you want
to say?\f
If you want to change your message,
I’m the guy to see, yo!
HGSS.592.0027:
There are several portal machines here
at the Global Terminal.\f
You must set your Vs. Recorder in
the machines for communication.\f
Please do give the machines a try, as
they guide you through the operation.
HGSS.592.0028:
Welcome to the Global Terminal!\f
Here, you may join the huge community
of Trainers worldwide.\f
You may view the records of Trainers
like yourself from around the world.\f
You may also trade Pokémon with the
world’s Trainers.
HGSS.592.0029:
Connect to Nintendo Wi-Fi
Connection for Trainer Rankings? [0200,0000]
HGSS.592.0030:
Trainer Rankings is a team-based
ranking system for Trainers around\r
the world.\f
The Trainers will be divided into several
groups and ranked in many categories.\f
If you join, your Trainer achievements
are automatically sent to your team.\f
In other words, what you do as a
Trainer can help your team’s standings.\f
Beware!\f
If you enter a ranking category more
than once, only the points earned from\r
your previous report will be tallied.\f
HGSS.592.0031:
Connect to Nintendo Wi-Fi Connection
and examine the Battle Video\r
Rankings? [0200,0000]
HGSS.592.0032:
Battle Video Rankings is a gallery of
popular Battle Videos.\f
Study many classic battles and sharpen
your own Trainer skills.\f
HGSS.592.0036:
The green panel leads to the studios
for Box Data and Dress-Up Data on 2F.\f
The pink panel leads to the Battle
Video Gallery on 3F.
